title: Intense Savory Spanish Shrimp Gambas Al Ajillo
description: A savory and aromatic Spanish dish featuring succulent shrimp, spring onions, and a mirepoix base, perfect for a midnight craving. This raw-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a wok.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the grated carrots and diced celery and cook for 2 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the sliced spring onions and cook for 1 minute, until they start to wilt.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the peeled and deveined shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until they are pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the wok and set them aside on a plate.
Add the lemon juice to the wok and stir to combine with the remaining vegetables and spices.
Return the shrimp to the wok and toss to combine with the sauce.
Serve the gambas al ajillo immediately, garnished with additional spring onions if desired.
